mapper.select: select * from ai_chat where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time asc
select * from ai_chat where conversation_id = #{conversationId} order by create_time asc
mapper.insert: insert into ai_chat (user_id, conversation_id, user_question, ai_answer, knowledge_match, token_usage_input, token_usage_output, estimated_cost, feedback_content, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{conversationId}, #{userQuestion}, #{aiAnswer}, #{knowledgeMatch}, #{tokenUsageInput}, #{tokenUsageOutput}, #{estimatedCost}, #{feedbackContent}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_chat WHERE knowledge_match IS NULL OR knowledge_match = '[]' OR knowledge_match = '{}' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_chat SET feedback = #{feedback} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_chat ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT * FROM ai_chat WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_chat WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM ai_chat WHERE feedback_status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_chat WHERE feedback_status = 'PENDING_REVIEW'
SELECT * FROM ai_chat WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_chat WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_chat SET feedback_content = #{feedbackContent} WHERE id = #{id}
